topics.topic: Identify different works to be carried out in the Project
Collect data relevant to the project work
Carryout need survey
Select the most efficient method from the available choices based on preliminary investigation
Design the required elements of the project work as per standard practices
Prepare the working modules / equipment required for the project work
Estimate the cost of project, technological need, computer skills, materials and other equipment
Prepare the plan and schedule of starting time and sequence of operations to be carried out at various stages of the project work in detail
Prepare critical activities at various stages of the project work
Test various conditions with different electrical input parameter if required
Implement project work and record the results
Draw Appropriate Conclusions
